title: Advances
doc_html:
§786.  Advances

Whenever the receipts and earnings of the clerk's office are insufficient to provide for the normal salaries and expenses of the office, the police jury of the parish may advance to the clerk's salary fund such funds as may be necessary to pay these expenses.
doc_text:
§786.  Advances
Whenever the receipts and earnings of the clerk's office are insufficient to provide for the normal salaries and expenses of the office, the police jury of the parish may advance to the clerk's salary fund such funds as may be necessary to pay these expenses.
